expectations.evidence: Specifies 'Node.js/Express REST API' in the approach section and uses Express throughout the implementation.
Defines 7 endpoints: GET /api/products, GET /api/products/:id, POST /api/products, PUT /api/products/:id, PATCH /api/products/:id, DELETE /api/products/:id, GET /api/health.
Full CRUD implementation with in-memory store, input validation, filtering, sorting, pagination, proper HTTP status codes, seed data, and integration test suite (10 test cases).

eval_feedback.overall: The without_skill run produced a practical, runnable implementation with actual file artifacts (server.js, package.json, test.js). It includes more practical features (filtering, sorting, pagination, PATCH endpoint, seed data, health check) but lacks the structured workflow, coding conventions adherence, and TDD process that the with_skill run demonstrates.
